home.title: Rubik's Cube Solver
home.subtitle: Select the size you want to solve, and enter the corresponding 3D learning and solving page.

card2x2.title: 2x2 Solver
card2x2.desc: Supports sticker painting input, solvability verification, and step-by-step optimal BFS playback.

card3x3.title: 3x3 Solver
card3x3.desc: Input scramble formula to generate inverse steps, including LBL tutorials and Kociemba solver.

common.formulaPlaceholder: e.g., R U R' U' F2

status.initializingDone: Solver ready. Input colors and click 'Solve'.
status.pleaseScramble: Please input or generate a scramble formula first.
status.editReady: Edit mode: Select a palette color and tap a sticker to paint it.
status.solveDone: Solution found: {{n}} steps. Click 'Next' to start.
status.manualSolveInfo: Reset to solved state. Please edit colors to match your cube, then solve.
status.clearedInfo: Cleared! Select a color and tap stickers to edit.
status.notScrambled: No solution found. Please click 'Solve' again.
status.invalidScramble: Unsupported move token: {{token}} (Only U, R, F, D, L, B with 2 or ' are supported)
status.stickersEmpty: Some stickers are not painted. Please paint all stickers first.
status.invalidColorCounts: Incorrect color count: {{face}} face has {{count}} stickers (must be 9).
status.wrongOrientations: Invalid corner orientations detected: {{count}} corners have incorrect twist. The cube might have been physically twisted or reassembled incorrectly. Suspect corners are flashing orange on screen.
status.wrongOrientations2x2: Invalid corner orientations detected. The physical cube might have been twisted. Suspect corners are flashing orange.
